titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Transvestite Tales
Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Transvestite Tales
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 10083650.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Sunday March 25, 2018 at 19:56

did.unittitle: Transgender erotic pulp fiction collection from the series Transvestite tales

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: Erotic pulp fiction related to male cross-dressing.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Transvestite Tales is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Transvestite Tales. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Erotic pulp fiction related to male cross-dressing.
Some individual titles (see accompanying list) taken from cover.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inventory label (?) on back cover with ms. number: 38 [?]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Stamp on top edge: 33 Barcode label on p. [1]"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Stamp on bottom edge: 46 Barcode label on p. [1]"

scopecontent.p: Stamp on top edge: Model Dist.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Price label on front cover, obscuring printed price: $3.94

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Stamp on top edge: 36 Barcode label on p. [1], partially obscuring printed advertisement, and p. [149]"

did.unitdate: c1993; first printing 1986 under title "TV biker"
